title: Runtime Safety Monitoring for Perception Systems in Autonomous Vehicles
abstract: We propose a lightweight runtime monitor that detects distribution shift in LiDAR-based perception pipelines. Our approach combines conformal prediction with scene-graph consistency checks to flag safety-critical failures in real time, achieving 94.3% detection recall with sub-2ms overhead on embedded hardware.

title: Adversarial Scenario Generation for AV Safety Testing Using Diffusion Models
abstract: We introduce SceneDiff, a diffusion-based framework for generating naturalistic yet adversarial driving scenarios. By conditioning on traffic graph representations, SceneDiff exposes rare but safety-critical failure modes in end-to-end driving planners, outperforming prior GAN-based approaches by 31% on coverage metrics.
